summary: Iteration 26 - GreenLink Backend & Frontend Testing. ALL 19 BACKEND TESTS PASSED. Frontend verified: Home page loads, Marketplace Intrants shows 12 demo products with filtering, Admin login successful, Profile page works.

issues: Console warning: In HTML, span cannot be a child of option/select - hydration warning (non-breaking)

critical_code_review_comments: marketplace.py: GET /api/marketplace/products returns correct product structure (name, price, category, supplier_name, stock_quantity)
marketplace.py: POST /api/marketplace/seed-demo-products correctly seeds 12 demo agricultural products with is_demo=true flag
auth.py: POST /api/auth/register validates phone format correctly (+225XXXXXXXXXX)
auth.py: POST /api/auth/login accepts identifier (email or phone) and password
auth.py: Admin self-healing password feature works correctly for known admin accounts
carbon_payments_dashboard.py: POST /api/carbon-payments/ma-prime returns farmer-facing fields only (no distribution breakdown)
carbon_listings.py: POST /api/carbon-listings/submit works for cooperatives, returns listing_id and status=pending_approval
carbon_listings.py: GET /api/carbon-listings/pending requires admin auth, returns 403 for non-admin
seed_data_creation: POST /api/marketplace/seed-demo-products seeds 12 demo agricultural products (engrais, pesticides, semences, outils, equipements)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 verified: Marketplace Intrants shows 12 products, Auth (register/login) works with valid Ivory Coast phone format (+225XXXXXXXXXX), Carbon Premium Calculator (/api/carbon-payments/ma-prime) returns farmer-facing data only, Carbon Credits submission/pending workflow verified. Admin dashboard shows 47 users, 12 products, 9 cooperatives.

features_verified.POST /api/auth/register (producteur): PASS - Returns access_token and user with user_type=producteur

features_verified.POST /api/auth/login (phone): PASS - Login with phone number as identifier works
features_verified.POST /api/auth/login (email): PASS - Login with email as identifier works
features_verified.POST /api/carbon-payments/ma-prime: PASS - Returns prime_par_kg_fcfa, prime_annuelle_fcfa, tonnes_co2_an, conseil
features_verified.Ma Prime distribution hidden: PASS - Response does NOT include distribution_model, fees, greenlink_share
features_verified.POST /api/carbon-listings/submit: PASS - Cooperative can submit, returns listing_id with status=pending_approval
features_verified.GET /api/carbon-listings/pending (admin): PASS - Admin can view pending listings
features_verified.Frontend: Home page: PASS - GreenLink branding, Primes Carbone, Calculer ma prime button visible
features_verified.Frontend: Marketplace page: PASS - 12 produits disponibles, search, category filter, product cards with XOF prices
features_verified.Frontend: Login page: PASS - Email/phone input, password field, Se connecter button
features_verified.Frontend: Profile page: PASS - Shows user profile with name, role, email, phone, account status
